title:
AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN SEBASTIAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MATAG-OB,
PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 667 / 67 OG No. 36, 7040 (September 6, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6194, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN SEBASTIAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MATAG-OB,

PROVINCE OF LEYTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Cap-on in the Barrio of Candelaria, Municipality of Matag-ob, Province of Leyte, is hereby separated from said barrio, and constituted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as the Barrio of San Sebastian.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
